prompt: Pause the strategy, preserve the record, alert legal and compliance, and prepare a self-report path instead of continuing the trading play.
summary: After receiving the California AG hold notice, the Portland desk halts the trading play, directs immediate preservation of all records and backups, alerts Legal and Compliance, and initiates a formal self-report path. Tim Belden acknowledges, confirms preservation actions, and commits to compiling and delivering a packet of trades, P&L, communications, logs, and personnel details within a short timeframe.

messages.subject: RE: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — HOLD & ESCALATE
messages.body_text:
Tim —

Acknowledged. Do not run or initiate any California‑related trading strategies until Legal and Compliance sign off. Immediately preserve all electronic and physical records: do not delete emails, documents, database entries, spreadsheets, calendars, code, or backups. Where possible take system snapshots and restrict write access to relevant stores.

I am notifying Legal and Compliance now and will coordinate a formal self‑report path. Please compile and send within 2 hours:
- Complete list of CA‑related trades and counterparties (last 6 months)
- Current positions and P&L for CA exposure
- Relevant emails, spreadsheets, scripts, and system logs
- Names of personnel involved and their roles

Confirm when preservation actions are complete.
messages.rationale: Immediate hold to preserve evidence for the AG inquiry; escalate to Legal/Compliance and gather materials required for a self‑report.

messages.subject: RE: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — HOLD & ESCALATE
messages.body_text:
Received and understood.

We have stopped the trading play and instructed the desk to pause all CA‑related orders. We have suspended deletions and begun backups and access restrictions. I will assemble the requested packet and deliver to you (and Legal/Compliance) within 2 hours:
- Trades/positions ledger (6 months)
- P&L and valuation reports
- Relevant communications, spreadsheets, scripts, and logs
- Personnel list and responsibilities

I will confirm preservation completion within 1 hour and notify you when the packet is ready.
messages.rationale: Acknowledges the hold, confirms preservation measures, and commits to producing the materials needed for the self‑report.

top_subjects: RE: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — HOLD & ESCALATE
RE: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — HOLD & ESCALATE
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
